business_ideas.idea: MicroStrategy: Software company converted to Bitcoin holding company via convertible bonds
Convertible bond arbitrage: Bond buyers unable to buy crypto directly use bonds to get Bitcoin exposure

predictions.text: MicroStrategy faces unraveling risk if Bitcoin crashes; forced liquidation could crash entire market
Every major crypto cycle produces outsized bets (FTX, 3AC, Celsius) that crash due to overextension
Apple stock call from 2012 ($2k/share) proved visionary; similar conviction on Bitcoin sustainability
